evals.prompt:
Run /func-req --project audit-log-fr

This is a backend feature with both EA and GA milestones. Generate functional requirements for both milestones sequentially. Read docs/projects/audit-log-fr/prd.md and docs/projects/audit-log-fr/tech-design.md as inputs. Write output to docs/projects/audit-log-fr/functional-requirements-ea.md and docs/projects/audit-log-fr/functional-requirements-ga.md.
evals.expected_output: Two functional requirements files: functional-requirements-ea.md covering US-01, US-02, US-04, US-06, US-09, US-14 and functional-requirements-ga.md covering US-03, US-05, US-07, US-08, US-10, US-11, US-12, US-13. Every technical task cites a tech-design.md section. No story appears in both docs. AI Workflows team dependency flagged in GA doc.

assertions.text: functional-requirements-ea.md contains story blocks for all 6 EA stories: US-01, US-02, US-04, US-06, US-09, and US-14
functional-requirements-ga.md contains story blocks for all 8 GA stories: US-03, US-05, US-07, US-08, US-10, US-11, US-12, and US-13
No US-XX story ID appears in both functional-requirements-ea.md and functional-requirements-ga.md (no overlap between EA and GA docs)
Every technical task line in both documents includes a parenthetical citation referencing tech-design.md (e.g., '(tech-design.md: API Contracts)' or '(tech-design.md: DB Schema)')
Both output files have 'status: draft' in their YAML frontmatter
Epic titles use the [EA] and [GA] prefix format (e.g., '# Epic: [EA] WE Audit Log')
US-07 in functional-requirements-ga.md includes an external dependency task referencing the AI Workflows team and is flagged with the EA blocker or dependency marker

evals.prompt:
Run /func-req --project rule-editor-history-fr

This is a UI-only feature with all stories in EA and no GA scope. Generate functional requirements. Read docs/projects/rule-editor-history-fr/prd.md and docs/projects/rule-editor-history-fr/tech-design.md as inputs. Write output to docs/projects/rule-editor-history-fr/functional-requirements-ea.md.
evals.expected_output: One functional requirements file: functional-requirements-ea.md covering US-01, US-02, US-03. No GA file created. No invented backend endpoints. All technical tasks are UI-only (React components, hooks). Each task cites tech-design.md. EA Audit Log team dependency noted.

assertions.text: functional-requirements-ea.md contains story blocks for all 3 EA stories: US-01, US-02, and US-03
No functional-requirements-ga.md file is created (no GA stories exist in the scope proposal)
No new backend API endpoints are invented as technical tasks — only the existing /internal/audit-events endpoint is referenced (feature is UI-only)
Every technical task line includes a parenthetical citation referencing tech-design.md
At least one story includes an external dependency task noting the EA Audit Log team as the owner (the inline panel depends on their API)
